title: rubus erectus
intro: Rubus erectus, also known as the thimbleberry, is a deciduous shrub native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds found in its leaves and roots. The health benefits of Rubus erectus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Rubus erectus can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to soothe digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
